# StudyAI Hub

> The honest guide to AI tools, study strategies, and productivity hacks for university students.

StudyAI Hub publishes practical, student-tested reviews of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, NotebookLM, and more) alongside study workflows, productivity systems, and exam-prep strategies. Content is written for university students who want to use AI ethically and effectively.

## Pages
- [Home](https://studyaihubt.lovable.app/): Featured posts, categories, and tool spotlights
- [Blog](https://studyaihubt.lovable.app/blog): All articles, filterable by category
- [AI Tools](https://studyaihubt.lovable.app/ai-tools): Curated directory of AI tools for students
- [About](https://studyaihubt.lovable.app/about): Mission, editorial standards, and the team
- [Contact](https://studyaihubt.lovable.app/contact): Get in touch

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://studyaihubt.lovable.app/sitemap.xml): Full URL index
